IRS990EZ.PrimaryExemptPurposeTxt: We empower IP for a better and more sustainable future for our planet for present & future generations through three pillars Intellectual Property Awareness & Education Intellectual Property Ecosystem Collaboration Intellectual Property Access and Engagement

ProgramSrvcAccomplishmentGrp.DescriptionProgramSrvcAccomTxt: Global Intellectual Property Alliance GLIPA the Georgian Intellectual Property Alliance GIPA and the United States Intellectual Property Alliance USIPA organize a conference in Atlanta Georgia along with associated events. These gatherings offer networking opportunities and panel discussions on topics relevant to the intellectual property community.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: | Other Expenses:, Amount:| Insurance, $7393.00| Marketing, $9700.00| Travel, $7711.00| Office Supplies and Software, $4952.00| Bank Fees, $112.00| Commissions, $1000.00| Gifts and Recognition, $70.00|
